ksa_text: Ability to develop and communicate data quality investment strategies that prioritize remediation efforts based on business impact and organizational decision-making needs.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop a data management strategy that helps to prioritize investments and resource allocations (e.g., data analytics, data infrastructure).

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-A-001 (Data Quality/Ability) excluded: edge_case: 1 core signals, 0 OOS signals, composite 0.426. Highest framework: DDaT at 0.426.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with edge_case scope, Data Quality, composite 0.426. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge exclusion of Data Quality (composite 0.426)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Quality at ~50% market presence. Retrieval accuracy and data quality validation in ~50% of Memory Eng postings. Exclusion consistent with role scope.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent. Final decision: exclude.
